text:
00 - Not Medicare Enrolled
01 - QMB only
02 - QMB + full Medicaid
03 - SLMB-only
04 - SLMB + full dual Medicaid benefits
05 - QDWI
06 - QI
08 - Other full benefit
09 - Other dual eligible without Medicaid
99 - Unknown
NA - Non Medicaid
XX - Enrolled in Medicare, no MIIR record
 E_MME_TYPE_1 - 12 Monthly Medicare and/or Medicaid enrollment (MME) type classification. January through December. 5 - Full dual 
4 - QMB dual 
3 - Partial dual 
2 - Medicare only
1 - Medicaid only with a
